results.question: Combien de triple-doubles Russell Westbrook a-t-il en carriere ?
results.answer:
Russell Westbrook détient le record absolu de triple-doubles en carrière avec **198** à la fin de la saison 2022-23.

Voici le détail :
- **198 triple-doubles** en carrière (record NBA)
- Moyenne de 11,3 points, 8,4 rebonds et 10,8 passes décisives par match
- A dépassé Oscar Robertson (181) en novembre 2021
- A réalisé 5 triple-doubles en playoffs

Sources : Basketball Reference, NBA.com

results.question: What is LeBron James' career scoring average?
results.answer:
LeBron James' career scoring average is **27.1 points per game** through the 2022-23 season.

This ranks him 3rd all-time in career scoring average among players with at least 200 games played, behind only Michael Jordan (30.1) and Kevin Durant (27.7).

His scoring has evolved throughout his career:
- Rookie season (2003-04): 20.9 PPG
- Peak scoring years (2005-2010): 27.7-31.4 PPG
- Recent seasons (2020-2023): 25.0-30.3 PPG

At age 38 in 2022-23, he averaged 30.3 PPG, becoming the oldest player

results.question: Who holds the NBA record for most career assists?
results.answer:
John Stockton holds the NBA record for most career assists with **15,806 assists** over his 19-year career with the Utah Jazz (1984-2003).

Key details:
- Played 1,504 games (all with Utah Jazz)
- Averaged 10.5 assists per game
- Led the league in assists per game 5 times (1987-88, 1989-90, 1991-92, 1994-95, 1995-96)
- Also holds the record for most career steals (3,265)

Second on the all-time list is Jason Kidd with 12,091 assists, followed by Chris Paul (10,977), Steve Nash (10,335), and Magi

results.question: What is Stephen Curry's career three-point shooting percentage?
results.answer:
Stephen Curry's career three-point shooting percentage is **43.2%** (2,842 made 3-pointers on 6,575 attempts) through the 2023-24 season.

This ranks him among the most efficient long-range shooters in NBA history. For context:
- His career 3P% is higher than Ray Allen (40.0%) and Reggie Miller (39.5%)
- He's the all-time leader in made three-pointers (3,390+ as of March 2024)
- His 3P% is even more impressive considering his volume (6,575 attempts is 2nd all-time)

His single-season best was 44

results.question: Quel joueur a le plus de titres MVP en saison reguliere ?
results.answer:
Le joueur qui détient le record du plus grand nombre de titres de MVP en saison régulière est **Kareem Abdul-Jabbar** avec **6 MVP**.

Voici le classement complet des joueurs avec le plus de MVP :

1. **Kareem Abdul-Jabbar** - 6 MVP (1971, 1972, 1974, 1976, 1977, 1980)
2. **LeBron James** - 4 MVP (2009, 2010, 2012, 2013)
3. **Michael Jordan** - 5 MVP (1988, 1991, 1992, 1996, 1998)
4. **Bill Russell** - 5 MVP (1958, 1961, 1962, 1963, 1965)
5. **Wilt Chamberlain** - 4 MVP (1960, 1966, 1967, 1968)

results.question: What is the NBA record for most blocks in a single game?
results.golden: Elmore Smith with 17 blocks on October 28, 1973
results.answer:
The NBA record for most blocks in a single game is **17 blocks**, shared by two players:

1. **Elmore Smith** (Los Angeles Lakers) - October 28, 1973 vs Portland Trail Blazers
2. **Dikembe Mutombo** (Denver Nuggets) - December 23, 1995 vs Detroit Pistons

**Elmore Smith's game:**
- 17 blocks in 45 minutes
- Also recorded 5 points and 5 rebounds
- Lakers won 111-98

**Dikembe Mutombo's game:**
- 17 blocks in 39 minutes
- Also recorded 20 points and 10 rebounds
- Nuggets won 117-105

results.question: Quel est le True Shooting % le plus eleve pour une saison (min 1000 pts) ?
results.answer:
Le True Shooting Percentage (TS%) le plus élevé pour une saison avec un minimum de 1000 points marqués est détenu par **Stephen Curry** lors de la saison 2015-2016 avec les Golden State Warriors.

**Statistiques de Curry en 2015-2016 :**
- TS% : **66.9%**
- Points marqués : 1,853
- Matchs joués : 79
- Tirs réussis : 46.8% FG
- Tirs à 3 points : 45.4% 3P
- Lancers francs : 91.4% FT

results.question: Quel est le record de points en un seul match NBA ?
results.golden: 100 points par Wilt Chamberlain le 2 mars 1962
results.answer:
Le record de points en un seul match NBA est de 100 points, établi par Wilt Chamberlain le 2 mars 1962 avec les Philadelphia Warriors contre les New York Knicks.

Statistiques du match :
- 36/63 aux tirs (57.1%)
- 28/32 aux lancers francs (87.5%)
- 25 rebonds
- 0 passe décisive
- 48 minutes jouées
- Warriors victoire 169-147

Contexte :
- Match à Hershey, Pennsylvanie
- Chamberlain a marqué 41 points en première mi-temps, 28 au troisième quart, 31 au quatrième
- Aucune retransmission télévisée,

results.question: Combien de fois Michael Jordan a-t-il ete meilleur marqueur de la NBA ?
results.answer:
Michael Jordan a été meilleur marqueur de la NBA **10 fois** au cours de sa carrière :

1. 1986-87 : 37.1 PPG
2. 1987-88 : 35.0 PPG  
3. 1988-89 : 32.5 PPG
4. 1989-90 : 33.6 PPG
5. 1990-91 : 31.5 PPG
6. 1991-92 : 30.1 PPG
7. 1992-93 : 32.6 PPG
8. 1995-96 : 30.4 PPG
9. 1996-97 : 29.6 PPG
10. 1997-98 : 28.7 PPG

Son total de 10 titres de meilleur marqueur est un record de la NBA, devant Wilt Chamberlain (7 fois) et Allen Iverson (4 fois).

Source : Basketball Reference - https://www.basketball-ref

results.question: What is Nikola Jokic's career assist average?
results.answer:
Nikola Jokic's career assist average is **7.4 assists per game** (as of the end of the 2023-24 NBA season).

Here are his career stats:
- Games played: 683
- Assists: 5,053
- Assist average: 7.4 APG

For context:
- His assist numbers have increased significantly over his career
- He averaged just 2.7 APG in his first two seasons (2015-17)
- Has averaged 9+ APG in each of the last four seasons (2020-21 through 2023-24)
- Led the league in assists in 2023-24 with 10.7 APG

His career high is 11.3
